0.q: TgMYB44 functions as a positive regulator for petal senescence by enhancing ABA biosynthesis in tulips

1.q: silencing TgMYB44 in tulip delayed petal senescence through inhibiting TgNCED3 expression and ABA accumulation

2.q: Overexpression of TgMYB44 altered the sensitivity to ABA, salt, and osmotic stress, as well as enhanced ABA accumulation and ABA-induced leaf senescence in Arabidopsis.
